coachAM: The scattered gratitude entries and the glaring absence of evening reflections reveal a founder running on fumes, consistently failing to lock down the Sleep Protocol and Training because the day's energy is bled dry by "loop scrolling" and "laziness," leaving no reserves for the discipline required at the bookends of the day. This lack of daily disciplined closure is the root cause of your collapsing physical and mental resilience, directly eroding the foundational capacity needed to convert your elite opportunities into sustained, high-level execution and impact. Tonight, before anything else, conduct a full PM Review, identifying precisely where the day's energy was wasted and outlining tomorrow's #1 priority.
